page-title: Birth By Sleep — Command Melding Calculator
kh-title: Birth By Sleep — Command Melding Calculator
kh-subtitle: Pick ingredients to see what they make, or work backwards from a command or your owned abilities. Data from Final Fantasy Kingdom's melding chart.
hint-forward: Start typing in a slot — it suggests matching ingredients. Set slot 1 to see everything it can become and the slot-2 partners. Set both to narrow to the exact command. Add a crystal for the single resulting ability. Pick a character to hide recipes that character can't use.
hint-bycommand: Shows every recipe for that command. Pick a crystal to also see the ability each recipe would grant. Pick a character to hide recipes that character can't use.
hint-byability: Tick the commands/items you have — only commands the chosen character can obtain are listed. The list below shows every command you can meld right now, plus who can use each recipe and the abilities each crystal would give.
hint-searchability: Shows every recipe that can produce that ability (with the matching crystal), filtered to the chosen character. Recipes where both commands are owned are highlighted; owned commands show as green chips.
hint-tracker: Set how many copies of each ability you've crafted. Abilities are listed in their in-game order. When the count reaches the max, it's marked completed and turns red with a strikethrough everywhere else in the app. Progress is saved in your browser, separately for each character.
hint-crystals: Every command meld also takes a crystal in the third slot, which decides the bonus ability — never the command itself. The recipe's type (A–P) picks the row; the crystal picks the column. Use this to find which crystal gives the ability you want, then check the recipe's type on the other tabs.
kh-forward-empty: Pick at least a Slot 1 ingredient to begin.
kh-forward-none-char: No recipe uses that combination usable by %1.
kh-legend-pinned: Showing the single ability granted by a %1 crystal for each recipe.
kh-legend-order: Each tag is the ability from a different crystal, in order: %1. Type a crystal above to pin one.
kh-cmd-empty: Choose a command to see all its recipes.
kh-cmd-cant: %1 can't be made by %2 (none of its recipes are available).
kh-legend-cmd-pinned: Ability shown is for a %1 crystal. Red with strikethrough = completed for %2.
kh-legend-cmd-tags: Tags = ability per crystal in order: %1. Red with strikethrough = completed for %2.
kh-owned-empty: Tick the commands and items %1 owns above to see what can be melded.
kh-owned-none: Nothing meldable yet from that set — try adding more ingredients.
kh-legend-owned: Crystal order for ability tags: %1. Red with strikethrough = already completed for %2.
kh-legend-chart: Read a recipe's type letter on the other tabs, find that row here, then read across to the crystal you'll use. Red with strikethrough = ability already completed for %1. Shotlock commands (type —) grant no ability.
kh-ab-empty: Choose an ability to see every recipe that can make it.
kh-ab-legend: %1 recipe(s) for %2; %3 you can make right now (highlighted). Apply a %4 crystal to guarantee %5.
kh-trk-reset-confirm: Reset all ability progress for %1? (Owned commands are kept.)
kh-tracker-link: Tracking achievements too? Open the Achievement Tracker →
kh-tip-ach: checked off in the Achievement Tracker
kh-tip-pick-ability: click to choose this ability, then press Meld
kh-melded: Melded %1 — marked owned here and in the Achievement Tracker.
kh-melded-ab: Melded %1 — %2 +1 in the Ability Tracker; both checked off in the Achievement Tracker.
kh-legend-meld: A green-tinted row means you already own the result (ticked here or checked off in the Achievement Tracker); green ingredient chips are owned, grey are missing. To record a meld: click the ability you'll take — or “None” to skip it, or pin a crystal above — then press Meld. The command and any ability are checked off in the Achievement Tracker and the ability count goes up in the Ability Tracker.
kp-note: Backs up / restores ALL Kingdom Hearts tracker progress on this site as a JSON file.
kp-import-confirm: Importing will overwrite the saved progress of every KH tool on this site with the file's contents. Continue?
kp-import-error: That file could not be read as a progress export.
kh-tip-none: meld this command without taking an ability
kh-tip-need-pick: choose an ability (or None) — or pin a crystal above — then press Meld
